author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented FractionalMaxPool2d (stochastic pooling with random partitions), LPPool1d/2d (Lp norm pooling), AdaptiveMaxPool1d/3d. All with backward and tests. Missing from full PyTorch parity: FractionalMaxPool3d, LPPool3d, MaxUnpool1d/3d (rare variants). 45 pooling tests pass.
